CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. Describes the change in the donor's application level versus the app they had last year. Drop = Donor had an application last year, but not this year Higher = Donor has a higher application this year versus what they had last year Lower = Donor has a lower application level this year versus what they had last year Same = Donor has the same application this year that they had last year
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Describes the change in the donor's application level versus the app they had last year. Drop = Donor had an application last year, but not this year Higher = Donor has a higher application this year versus what they had last year Lower = Donor has a lower application level this year versus what they had last year Same = Donor has the same application this year that they had last year
CustomField.label: App Level Change
